description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a light brick exterior, a prominent gable roof, and a spacious, well-defined yard enclosed by a low wall. The front of the house features a wide driveway leading to a detached garage, with a row of evenly spaced trees lining the entrance path. The main building has multiple windows distributed across its facades, and a small porch area is visible at the front entrance. The property includes landscaped green areas, paved walkways, and a secondary structure adjacent to the main house. The overall layout is symmetrical and organized, with clear separations between the driveway, garden, and living spaces. The roof is pitched, and the house is surrounded by a mix of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a gable roof, detached garage, and landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall. The property features a tree-lined driveway, multiple windows, and a small front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and tree-lined path.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical yard, row of trees, and the full length of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, garden area, and the back of the detached garage.
description_view_3: Opposite front angle showing the driveway, garage, and the main entrance with porch and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
